revision.comment: Protected "[[Template:Find sources/proj/is med]]": [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|High-risk template or module]]: 47405 transclusions ([[User:MusikBot II/TemplateProtector|more info]]) ([Edit=Require template editor access] (indefinite) [Move=Require template editor access] (indefinite))
revision.text:
{{#if: {{find page text|text=%{%{Wiki[pP]roject ?[mM]edicine|plain=f}} | 1 | {{#if: {{find page text|text=%{%{[wW][pP] ?[mM][eE][dD]|plain=f}} | 1 | }} }}{{Documentation|content= == Usage == Checks the WikiProjects listed on the current page for the presence of [[WP:WikiProject Medicine]] (and some of its redirects), and returns 1 if the project is found on the page, and empty if it is not. == Notes ==
The WikiProject template is [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special%3AWhatLinksHere/Template%3AWikiProject_Medicine&namespace=1&hideredirs=1&hidelinks=1&limit=500 WikiProject_Medicine] and has more than 500 in-links. Some of the redirects detected by this template are: {{div col|colwidth=20em}} * [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special%3AWhatLinksHere/Template%3AWikiproject_Medicine&namespace=1&hideredirs=1&hidelinks=1&limit=500 Wikiproject_Medicine] > 500 in-links * [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special%3AWhatLinksHere/Template%3AWikiproject_med&namespace=1&hideredirs=1&hidelinks=1&limit=500 Wikiproject_med] 0 in-links * [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special%3AWhatLinksHere/Template%3AWikiproject_Med&namespace=1&hideredirs=1&hidelinks=1&limit=500 Wikiproject_Med] 0 in-links * [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special%3AWhatLinksHere/Template%3AWikiproject_medicine&namespace=1&hideredirs=1&hidelinks=1&limit=500 Wikiproject_medicine] 6 in-links * [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special%3AWhatLinksHere/Template%3AWP_Med&namespace=1&hideredirs=1&hidelinks=1&limit=500 WP Med] 4 in-links * [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special%3AWhatLinksHere/Template%3AWP_Medicine&namespace=1&hideredirs=1&hidelinks=1&limit=500 WP Medicine] 240 in-links * [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special%3AWhatLinksHere/Template%3AWP:MED&namespace=1&hideredirs=1&hidelinks=1&limit=500 WP:MED] 0 in-links * [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special%3AWhatLinksHere/Template%3AWpmed&namespace=1&hideredirs=1&hidelinks=1&limit=500 Wpmed] 5 in-links * [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special%3AWhatLinksHere/Template%3AWPMed&namespace=1&hideredirs=1&hidelinks=1&limit=500 WPMed] 18 in-links * [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special%3AWhatLinksHere/Template%3AWPMED&namespace=1&hideredirs=1&hidelinks=1&limit=500 WPMED] > 500 in-links * [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special%3AWhatLinksHere/Template%3AWPMedicine&namespace=1&hideredirs=1&hidelinks=1&limit=500 WPMedicine] 47 in-links {{div col end}} Existing redirects with in-links not currently detected: * [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special%3AWhatLinksHere/Template%3AWPMEDICINE&namespace=1&hideredirs=1&hidelinks=1&limit=500 WPMEDICINE] 6 in-links
Note about false positives: this template would also match other redirects, such as "wP mEd", but this shouldn't be a problem, as any string it matches, if created, would likely be assigned as a redirect to project Medicine and not to some other project. }}

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing this file, and also doing a full refresh import of all dependencies, because I am concerned this is one with a lot of broken dependencies. Intended end result is the template [[Template:Talk page header]] which is gonna be highly customized to our usage later on
revision.text:
{{#if: {{find page text|text=%{%{Wiki[pP]roject ?[mM]edicine|plain=f}} | 1 | {{#if: {{find page text|text=%{%{[wW][pP] ?[mM][eE][dD]|plain=f}} | 1 | }} }}{{Documentation|content= == Usage == Checks the WikiProjects listed on the current page for the presence of [[WP:WikiProject Medicine]] (and some of its redirects), and returns 1 if the project is found on the page, and empty if it is not. == Notes ==
The WikiProject template is [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special%3AWhatLinksHere/Template%3AWikiProject_Medicine&namespace=1&hideredirs=1&hidelinks=1&limit=500 WikiProject_Medicine] and has more than 500 in-links. Some of the redirects detected by this template are: {{div col|colwidth=20em}} * [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special%3AWhatLinksHere/Template%3AWikiproject_Medicine&namespace=1&hideredirs=1&hidelinks=1&limit=500 Wikiproject_Medicine] > 500 in-links * [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special%3AWhatLinksHere/Template%3AWikiproject_med&namespace=1&hideredirs=1&hidelinks=1&limit=500 Wikiproject_med] 0 in-links * [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special%3AWhatLinksHere/Template%3AWikiproject_Med&namespace=1&hideredirs=1&hidelinks=1&limit=500 Wikiproject_Med] 0 in-links * [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special%3AWhatLinksHere/Template%3AWikiproject_medicine&namespace=1&hideredirs=1&hidelinks=1&limit=500 Wikiproject_medicine] 6 in-links * [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special%3AWhatLinksHere/Template%3AWP_Med&namespace=1&hideredirs=1&hidelinks=1&limit=500 WP Med] 4 in-links * [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special%3AWhatLinksHere/Template%3AWP_Medicine&namespace=1&hideredirs=1&hidelinks=1&limit=500 WP Medicine] 240 in-links * [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special%3AWhatLinksHere/Template%3AWP:MED&namespace=1&hideredirs=1&hidelinks=1&limit=500 WP:MED] 0 in-links * [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special%3AWhatLinksHere/Template%3AWpmed&namespace=1&hideredirs=1&hidelinks=1&limit=500 Wpmed] 5 in-links * [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special%3AWhatLinksHere/Template%3AWPMed&namespace=1&hideredirs=1&hidelinks=1&limit=500 WPMed] 18 in-links * [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special%3AWhatLinksHere/Template%3AWPMED&namespace=1&hideredirs=1&hidelinks=1&limit=500 WPMED] > 500 in-links * [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special%3AWhatLinksHere/Template%3AWPMedicine&namespace=1&hideredirs=1&hidelinks=1&limit=500 WPMedicine] 47 in-links {{div col end}} Existing redirects with in-links not currently detected: * [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special%3AWhatLinksHere/Template%3AWPMEDICINE&namespace=1&hideredirs=1&hidelinks=1&limit=500 WPMEDICINE] 6 in-links
Note about false positives: this template would also match other redirects, such as "wP mEd", but this shouldn't be a problem, as any string it matches, if created, would likely be assigned as a redirect to project Medicine and not to some other project. }}

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Find_sources%2Fproj%2Fis_med here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{#if: {{find page text|text=%{%{Wiki[pP]roject ?[mM]edicine|plain=f}} | 1 | {{#if: {{find page text|text=%{%{[wW][pP] ?[mM][eE][dD]|plain=f}} | 1 | }} }}{{Documentation|content= == Usage == Checks the WikiProjects listed on the current page for the presence of [[WP:WikiProject Medicine]] (and some of its redirects), and returns 1 if the project is found on the page, and empty if it is not. == Notes ==
The WikiProject template is [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special%3AWhatLinksHere/Template%3AWikiProject_Medicine&namespace=1&hideredirs=1&hidelinks=1&limit=500 WikiProject_Medicine] and has more than 500 in-links. Some of the redirects detected by this template are: {{div col|colwidth=20em}} * [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special%3AWhatLinksHere/Template%3AWikiproject_Medicine&namespace=1&hideredirs=1&hidelinks=1&limit=500 Wikiproject_Medicine] > 500 in-links * [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special%3AWhatLinksHere/Template%3AWikiproject_med&namespace=1&hideredirs=1&hidelinks=1&limit=500 Wikiproject_med] 0 in-links * [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special%3AWhatLinksHere/Template%3AWikiproject_Med&namespace=1&hideredirs=1&hidelinks=1&limit=500 Wikiproject_Med] 0 in-links * [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special%3AWhatLinksHere/Template%3AWikiproject_medicine&namespace=1&hideredirs=1&hidelinks=1&limit=500 Wikiproject_medicine] 6 in-links * [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special%3AWhatLinksHere/Template%3AWP_Med&namespace=1&hideredirs=1&hidelinks=1&limit=500 WP Med] 4 in-links * [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special%3AWhatLinksHere/Template%3AWP_Medicine&namespace=1&hideredirs=1&hidelinks=1&limit=500 WP Medicine] 240 in-links * [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special%3AWhatLinksHere/Template%3AWP:MED&namespace=1&hideredirs=1&hidelinks=1&limit=500 WP:MED] 0 in-links * [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special%3AWhatLinksHere/Template%3AWpmed&namespace=1&hideredirs=1&hidelinks=1&limit=500 Wpmed] 5 in-links * [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special%3AWhatLinksHere/Template%3AWPMed&namespace=1&hideredirs=1&hidelinks=1&limit=500 WPMed] 18 in-links * [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special%3AWhatLinksHere/Template%3AWPMED&namespace=1&hideredirs=1&hidelinks=1&limit=500 WPMED] > 500 in-links * [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special%3AWhatLinksHere/Template%3AWPMedicine&namespace=1&hideredirs=1&hidelinks=1&limit=500 WPMedicine] 47 in-links {{div col end}} Existing redirects with in-links not currently detected: * [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special%3AWhatLinksHere/Template%3AWPMEDICINE&namespace=1&hideredirs=1&hidelinks=1&limit=500 WPMEDICINE] 6 in-links
Note about false positives: this template would also match other redirects, such as "wP mEd", but this shouldn't be a problem, as any string it matches, if created, would likely be assigned as a redirect to project Medicine and not to some other project. }}
